title: i18n: localize Instance Settings → General page (ZAI-152)
description:
## Scope
The Instance Settings → General page (http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/general) is rendered in Russian locale but most strings are still English. The user specifically asked for ru localization (Eng → Rus). Per project memory `project_localization_round3`, please cover all 8 locales (en, ru, de, es, pt, uk, zh, el) so we do not regress the round-3 8-locale sweep.

## File to wire through i18n
- `ui/src/pages/InstanceGeneralSettings.tsx` — currently has hardcoded English strings. Needs a new namespace (e.g., `instance.settings.general.*`) wired through `useTranslation()` / `t()`.

## Strings observed un-translated on the page (non-exhaustive)

Section headers and labels still in English (line numbers from a quick grep):

- L90: `General` (h1)
- L107: `Deployment and auth`
- L115: `Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.`
- Also: `Local trusted`, `Auth readiness`, `Ready`
- L126: `Bootstrap status`
- L130: `Bootstrap invite`, `None`
- L140: `Censor username in logs` + body copy + `This is off by default.`
- L159: `Keyboard shortcuts` + body copy + `This is off by default.`
- L177: `Backup retention` + body copy
- L186, L215, L245: `Daily`, `Weekly`, `Monthly`
- Preset values: `3 days`, `7 days`, `14 days`, `1 week`, `2 weeks`, `4 weeks`, `1 month`, `3 months`, `6 months`
- L279: `AI feedback sharing` + body copy + `Read our terms of service`
- `No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.`
- L305: `Always allow` / `Share voted AI outputs automatically.`
- L310: `Don't allow` / `Keep voted AI outputs local only.`
- The local-dev hint paragraph starting `To retest the first-use prompt in local dev,...`
- L355: `Sign out` (h2)
- L357: `Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.`
- L367: `Signing out...` / `Sign out`

## Acceptance criteria
1. All visible strings on `/instance/settings/general` resolved through `t()` (no hardcoded English literals in JSX).
2. Translation files updated for all 8 locales: en, ru, de, es, pt, uk, zh, el.
3. Manual sweep in Russian locale shows zero English leaks on this page.
4. No regressions on the page in English locale.
5. Per board memory `feedback_qa_warn_is_fail`: WARN with leakage = FAIL — open the sweep report file and confirm zero leaks before marking done.

## Notes
- Parent issue ZAI-152 is the user-facing report (in Russian). Screenshot only shows `/instance/settings/general` — do not balloon scope to other pages.
- Use the same translation conventions established in ZAI-138/ZAI-139 round 3.
- When done, leave a summary comment on the child and reassign to CEO for review.

## Verification (required before marking done)
- Run a Playwright/QA sweep in `ru` locale across the page.
- Attach the sweep report to this issue.

This issue was opened by CEO on behalf of board issue ZAI-152.

ancestors.title: недопереведено
ancestors.description: нужно доперевести локализацию Англ Рус [http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/general](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/general) [Т](http://127.0.0.1:3105/CMP/dashboard) [S](http://127.0.0.1:3105/SDF/dashboard) **Настройки экземпляра** [Профиль](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/profile)[Общее](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/general)[Доступ](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/access)[Мониторинг](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/heartbeats)[Экспериментальные](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/experimental)[Плагины](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/plugins)[Адаптеры](http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/adapters) Board 1. Instance Settings 2. 3. General # General Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing. ## Deployment and auth Local trusted Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required. Auth readiness Ready Bootstrap status Ready Bootstrap invite None ## Censor username in logs Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default. ## Keyboard shortcuts Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default. ## Backup retention Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved. ### Daily 3 days 7 days 14 days ### Weekly 1 week 2 weeks 4 weeks ### Monthly 1 month 3 months 6 months ## AI feedback sharing Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally. [Read our terms of service](https://paperclip.ing/tos) No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here. Always allow Share voted AI outputs automatically. Don't allow Keep voted AI outputs local only. To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the `feedbackDataSharingPreference` key from the `instance_settings.general` JSON row for this instance, or set it back to `"prompt"`. Unset and `"prompt"` both mean no default has been chosen yet. ## Sign out Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page. Sign out

project.name: Localization
project.description:
**Project Goal**

Replace hardcoded English text in UI with localization variables (react-i18next / i18next), while simultaneously ensuring support for two languages: English (en) and Russian (ru). A language switcher dropdown menu is added to the UI, designed according to the project design. The process is executed iteratively by a team of agents until all text elements are fully covered.

**Directory Structure**

```
C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales\
├── en\                         # Translation files — English
├── ru\                         # Translation files — Russian
└── ~temp\
    ├── PROJECT_DESIGN.md
    └── HARDCODED_ENGLISH_ELEMENTS_MAP.md

```

**Localization Library**

react-i18next / i18next — configuration and existing translations are located in: `C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales`

**Agent Roles**

**Developer** — localization developer: replaces hardcode with `t('key')`, maintains `en\` and `ru\` files, implements dropdown menu.

**QA** — browser tester: checks server availability at [`http://127.0.0.1:3105/`](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), searches for unreplaced English strings when Russian language is active, updates MAP file.

**Orchestrator** — monitors the last update date of MAP file; if file is updated — starts new Developer → QA cycle.

**Statuses in MAP File**

| Status         | Set By        | Meaning                                          |
| -------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| TODO           | Browser agent | Found English text, needs localization           |
| DONE           | Developer     | Localization completed, awaiting QA verification |
| TODO + comment | QA            | Checked, found problem, returned to Developer    |
| QA\_OK         | QA            | Checked, everything works correctly              |

**Working Cycle (Loop)**

```
Browser agent → TODO
      ↓
Developer → DONE
      ↓
QA checks DONE
      ↓
  [not OK] → TODO + comment → Developer → DONE → QA...
  [OK]    → QA_OK

```

**Plan**

**Step 1 — Browser agent: audit of visible English elements**

* Opens [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), switches to Russian language.
* Goes through all available screens.
* For each found English text, records in MAP file:
  * full element text
  * HTML element
  * CSS selector
  * status TODO

**Step 2 — Developer: hardcode replacement**

* Takes records with TODO status from MAP file.
* By text, HTML element and CSS selector finds location in codebase.
* Replaces with t('key'), adds translations to en\ and ru.
* Sets status DONE.

**Step 3 — QA: DONE verification**

* Receives signal about appearance of records with DONE status in MAP file.
* First basic check: [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) responds and not black screen. If black screen — cycle stops, Developer fixes.
* Switches to Russian language, checks specific elements from DONE records.
* If problem — changes status back to TODO with comment on what exactly is wrong.
* If everything is correct — sets QA\_OK.

**Step 4 — Iteration**

* Browser agent again goes through all screens searching for remaining English strings.
* New strings → TODO, cycle repeats.
* Orchestrator starts new cycle with each appearance of TODO in MAP file.

**Final Verification (when all records are QA\_OK)**

* QA goes through all records with QA\_OK status — full regression run.
* Checks that previously completed localization hasn't broken during subsequent changes.
* If something broke — record returns to TODO with comment, cycle resumes.
* If everything is fine — project is considered completed.

**Completion Criterion**

All records in MAP file have QA\_OK status, final regression run is passed, server [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) loads stably.

goal.title: Хардкоды в Английский и Русский (локализация)
goal.description: UI не трогать (исключение \= добавленное выпадающее меню смены языка)
